title: MTR Small ferry
description: This packs adds a 2-deck ferry to the Minecraft Transit railway mod.
body:
## What this pack adds?
a 2-deck ferry with 8 seats in the lower deck and 20 in the upper deck & two livery options.
## Why would you want to use this pack?
This ship is larger than what's provided by MTR.
# NOTICE
This pack requires MTR 4.0.0 to work.
